creator: freebsd@phil.spodhuis.org
text: What's the easiest way to create an ISO with this patch applied, please?  I have an Asus laptop which is displaying this, and reporting no network devices attached, so I _think_ that perhaps the non-enumerable device is earlier in the USB device walk than the network drivers, locking them out, making it hard to fetch and install the patch locally.  A bit of a catch-22.
